info.title: Laravel
info.description: Reference for the Neuroflow API, including Sanctum authentication, email verification, password reset, and authenticated user endpoints.

get.summary: List the available audios for a mode

post.summary: Register a new user and send the verification email
Authenticate a verified user and issue a Sanctum access token

get.summary: Verify the user's email from the signed verification link

post.summary: Send a password reset link to the given email address

get.summary: Return the reset password token payload for API clients

post.summary: Reset the user's password using a valid reset token

get.summary: List the items allowed for the authenticated user's profile
Show an item allowed for the authenticated user's profile

get.description:
Authorization rules:
- Admin profile: can list every user.
- User profile: cannot list users. Use `GET /api/user` or `GET /api/users/{user}` for the authenticated user instead.

post.description:
Authorization rules:
- Admin profile: can create users and set `profile_id`, `email`, and `email_verified_at`.
- User profile: cannot create users.

When `profile_id` is omitted, the user is created with the default User profile.

get.description:
Authorization rules:
- Admin profile: can view any user.
- User profile: can view only itself.

The response includes the user's profile, email verification date, and timestamps.

put.description:
Authorization rules:
- Admin profile: can update any user and may edit `name`, `password`, `profile_id`, `email`, and `email_verified_at`.
- User profile: can update only itself and may edit only `name` and `password`.

For non-admin users, any submitted `profile_id`, `email`, or `email_verified_at` fields are ignored by validation and are not changed.

delete.description:
Authorization rules:
- Admin profile: can delete users.
- User profile: cannot delete users, including itself.

Deleting a user also revokes all of that user's access tokens.

message.const: Use this token and email address to complete the password reset.

name.description: Display name for the audio. Must be unique.

mode_id.description: Mode linked to this audio. Send `null` or omit it to keep the audio unassigned.

file.description: Audio file uploaded to Laravel storage. Maximum size is 200 MB.

description.description: Description for what the mode controls or represents.

color.description: Hex color used to represent the mode.

profile_id.description: Profile assigned to the new user. Admin-only. When omitted, the default User profile is used.

email.description: Login email for the user. Admin-only on user creation and must be unique.

email_verified_at.description: Email verification timestamp. Admin-only. Send `null` or omit it to keep the user unverified.

password.description: User password. Must be confirmed with `password_confirmation`.

name.description: Display name for the audio. Must be unique.

mode_id.description: Mode linked to this audio. Send `null` to remove the mode assignment.

file.description: Replacement audio file uploaded to Laravel storage. Maximum size is 200 MB.

description.description: Description for what the mode controls or represents.

color.description: Hex color used to represent the mode.

name.description: Display name. Admins can update this for any user; regular users can update it only for themselves.

password.description: Password. Admins can update this for any user; regular users can update it only for themselves. Must be confirmed with `password_confirmation`.

profile_id.description: Profile assigned to the user. Admin-only on update. Ignored for regular users.

email.description: Login email for the user. Admin-only on update and must be unique. Ignored for regular users.

email_verified_at.description: Email verification timestamp. Admin-only on update. Send `null` to mark the user as unverified. Ignored for regular users.

message.const: Registration successful. Please verify your email address.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
